content: Phase 1: Create POC test script covering MongoDB + Cashfree + Shiprocket
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until all integrations pass
Phase 2: Backend implementation (models, public + admin routers, integrations)
Phase 2: Seed default mediums + homepage content + demo orders
Phase 2: Admin frontend (Dashboard, Orders, Mediums, Gallery, Testimonials, Content, Coupons, Settings, Analytics)
Phase 2: Create INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md for Next.js site
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 (all user stories)
